name: merkle audit log: 50 parallel appends produce 50 well-formed lines (no torn writes), and verify-chain succeeds
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && for i in $(seq 1 50); do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event "e$i" --actor t --data {} & done; wait && [ "$(wc -l < .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl | tr -d " ")" = "50" ] && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --verify-chain && echo ok 1>&2
